title: Setting Risk-Based GMP Audit Frequency
alt: Five steps to set GMP audit frequency from risk assessment to ongoing monitoring

items.label: Assess risk factors
items.desc: Score criticality, complexity, compliance history, status, dependency

items.label: Band into risk tiers
items.desc: Group suppliers into high, medium and low risk bands

items.label: Assign baseline intervals
items.desc: High 1-2 yrs, medium 2-3 yrs, low 3+ yrs

items.label: Apply for-cause triggers
items.desc: Deviations, recalls, major changes or unclosed CAPAs override the schedule

items.label: Monitor between visits
items.desc: Questionnaires, quality agreements and performance data

items.label: Review risk ratings
items.desc: Re-rate periodically as supplier risk profiles change
